CONSTITUTIONAL_GATE_HEALTHY.description: ENT-000388 (Constitutional Gate) must be ACTIVE — system integrity depends on it
CONSTITUTIONAL_GATE_HEALTHY.rationale: The constitutional gate is fail-closed by design. Any status other than ACTIVE means all inbound requests bypass constitutional validation, creating a governance hole that cannot be detected at runtime.
CONSTITUTIONAL_GATE_HEALTHY.remediation: Restore ENT-000388 to ACTIVE status. Inspect lib/runtime/constitutional-gate.js for startup failures. Check server logs for 'constitutional-gate' error lines. Do not set status manually without verifying the module loads cleanly.

NO_ORPHANED_RELATIONSHIPS.description: All relationship endpoints must reference registered entities
NO_ORPHANED_RELATIONSHIPS.rationale: Orphaned edges corrupt graph traversal and impact analysis. An edge pointing to an unregistered ID silently inflates blast-radius counts and may generate false capability-degradation alerts.
NO_ORPHANED_RELATIONSHIPS.remediation: For each orphaned ID: either register the missing entity in the Registry catalogue, or remove the stale relationship entry from relationships.js SEED.
evidence: all relationship from/to IDs resolve in engine.lookup()

GOVERNED_MIGRATION_APPROVED.description: Governed migrations must not be stuck at PROPOSED or VALIDATED — they must reach APPROVED or beyond
GOVERNED_MIGRATION_APPROVED.rationale: A governed migration stuck at PROPOSED means a Registry-declared schema or data change has not been reviewed. Applying it without approval bypasses the governance lifecycle and may introduce undocumented state.
GOVERNED_MIGRATION_APPROVED.remediation: Advance the migration @status header: PROPOSED → VALIDATED → APPROVED. Run: registry migrate preflight <filename> to check for errors. Do not apply until status is APPROVED.

ACTIVE_SERVICE_MONITORED.description: All ACTIVE SERVICE/MIDDLEWARE/API entities must have a SYNC monitoring projection
ACTIVE_SERVICE_MONITORED.rationale: An ACTIVE service without a monitoring projection is invisible to the operational team. Failures will go undetected until user-reported. The monitoring projection verifies that the entity appears in the monitoring configuration.
ACTIVE_SERVICE_MONITORED.remediation: Wire the entity into the monitoring system (dashboard, alert rule, or health-check endpoint). Update the monitoring projection source configuration to include the entity path or ID. Recheck with: registry projection entity <ENT-ID>.

GOV_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.description: All GOV-family entities must have a SYNC documentation projection
GOV_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.rationale: Governance entities encode architectural decisions that affect the whole civilisation. Without documentation, the rationale behind governance rules becomes untraceable, making future changes uninformed and risky.
GOV_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.remediation: Create a documentation file in docs/ that references the entity's ENT-ID. The documentation projection search will detect ENT-ID mentions in .md files under docs/. At minimum document: purpose, authority source, and what happens if this entity fails.

ACTIVE_FILE_IN_REPO.description: All ACTIVE FILE/ROUTE/MIDDLEWARE entities must be tracked in git (repository projection SYNC)
ACTIVE_FILE_IN_REPO.rationale: An ACTIVE file not tracked in git is either undeployed, incorrectly registered, or has been removed without a status update. Any of these conditions means the Registry no longer reflects truth.
ACTIVE_FILE_IN_REPO.remediation: Option A: git add <path> to track the file and commit. Option B: Update the entity status in the catalogue to INACTIVE or REMOVED if the file was intentionally deleted. Run: registry projection entity <ENT-ID> to confirm.
evidence: git ls-files returns the entity path

HIGH_IMPACT_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.description: Entities classified CRITICAL or HIGH impact risk must have a SYNC documentation projection
HIGH_IMPACT_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.rationale: High-impact entities affect many dependents and capabilities. Without documentation, any change to them is made without understanding the blast radius — increasing the probability of cascading failures.
HIGH_IMPACT_ENTITY_DOCUMENTED.remediation: Create documentation in docs/ covering: purpose, known dependents, capability membership, change protocol, and known risks. Reference the ENT-ID so the documentation projection can detect it.
